entities.name: Pencil competition

entities.name: Status quo as competitor
entities.context: Strategic principle that non-adoption/manual alternatives are often bigger obstacles than competing products

relationships.context: Frequently uses this framework with startups to reframe competitive thinking

The pencil is a concrete metaphor for the broader status quo competition concept
Must apply this framework to understand true competition (manual recruiting, LinkedIn, etc.)
